name: TLDRTech
tagline: Daily tech newsletter with 3-5 sharp headlines
description: Landing page for email signups plus a daily cron-triggered newsletter email with a quick, beautiful roundup of 3-5 major tech headlines or hot takes from the previous day.

env_vars.description: SMTP port (usually 587 for STARTTLS or 465 for SSL relay frontends)
SMTP username (optional for local relay, required for most providers)
SMTP password/token (required when username is set)
Whether to run STARTTLS (true/false), defaults to true
Optional OpenAI key for improved one-line hot takes per headline
